title: Remove legacy fallback and shim paths in planning and runtime policy
description: Audit the planning and execution pipeline for legacy fallback branches and compatibility shims, then remove them in favor of the modern typed pipeline. This should include removing or replacing old compatibility branches in the planning router, chat interpreter, recovery logic, and any duplicated policy surfaces. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/MemorySmith_Agent_Commit5af0d74_Audit_and_PlanningArchitecture_2026-06-30.md, Data/Pages/Audits/memorysmith_agent_decomposition_delta_report.md, and the human requirements for Removal > deprecation > fallback.
